expectations.text: Output is valid JSON with id, name, description, variant, systemPrompt fields
expectations.evidence: All five fields present and well-formed

expectations.text: variant field is set to BP or bp (not EP)
Drill restricts to BP only (no tu, no enclisis, no EP forms in the system prompt or examples)
expectations.evidence: Explicit: 'Brazilian Portuguese only — no European Portuguese forms, no tu, no enclisis, no comparisons across variants'

expectations.text: Fixed 5-question opener uses singular subjects only (eu, voce, ele/ela) — no plural forms (nos, eles, vocês conjugations) per A1 atomic-focus principle
expectations.evidence: All 5 fixed exercises use eu/você/ele only; chips are [moro, mora, vivo, vive] — no plural forms

expectations.text: morar examples target residence contexts (city, address, where you live)
expectations.evidence: Q1 (eu + São Paulo), Q3 (você + onde), Q4 (ele + com os pais)

expectations.text: viver examples target being-alive or quality-of-life contexts (not residence)
expectations.evidence: Q2 (avó + ainda — being alive), Q5 (ele vive bem — quality of life)

expectations.text: All Portuguese example sentences include English translations or glosses
expectations.evidence: Every PT line in feedback templates is followed by English translation in parens

expectations.text: No fake accents on Portuguese words (no spurious accents like *moro vs móro, no ele vs êle)
expectations.evidence: All spellings real: moro, mora, vivo, vive, avó, anos, etc.

expectations.text: Includes vocabulary scaffolding (defines connector words like em, onde, com before use)
expectations.evidence: Explicit VOCABULARY SCAFFOLDING section listing em, onde, com, os pais, bem, ainda, noventa, avó, tem, anos
